description_long: This is a rectangular, multi-story apartment building with a light brick facade and a flat white roof. The building is set on a narrow plot with a driveway and two parked cars at the front, flanked by small flowering trees. The side of the building is lined with a row of mature, leafy trees, providing shade and privacy. Windows are symmetrically arranged along the facade, and there is a small outdoor patio or terrace area visible at the rear. The property is bordered by a well-maintained green lawn, and the overall appearance is clean and orderly. The structure appears to be designed for urban residential use, with clear access points and landscaping.
description: A rectangular, light-brick apartment building with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and landscaped surroundings including trees, a driveway, and parked cars.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, two parked cars, and small flowering trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of mature trees along the building and the length of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the building, patio area, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the building's length, windows, and the driveway entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in rows along the facade, evenly spaced and aligned both vertically and horizontally.
